channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser secures Democratic gubernatorial nomination
item.description: Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser won the Democratic primary for governor on Tuesday, defeating U.S. Sen. Michael Bennet.

item.title: A New Jersey Union Leader Seeks to Represent Millions of Teachers, but Silences Critics
item.description: Sean Spiller aims to lead the National Education Association, yet he has not hesitated to suppress educators' voices and funds.

item.title: Schnabel's Not-So-Divine Comedy
item.description: The film 'In the Hand of Dante' mocks itself, but Pacino and Scorsese provide a rescue.

item.title: Pat Buckley at 100
item.description: The wife of William F. Buckley Jr. was a significant figure in her own right.
